name: Thalassophobia
short_description: As a cataclysmic event rocks the planet, you find yourself in an old, decrepit submarine tasked with only one goal: survive. Manage the internal systems to keep yourself alive and fend off undersea horrors as they attempt to cut your journey short.
detailed_description:
As a cataclysmic event rocks the planet, you find yourself in an antiquated submarine tasked with only one goal: survive and reach a deep water facility. Manage the internal systems onboard the sub to keep yourself alive and fend off undersea horrors as they attempt to cut your journey short.



Thalassophobia is a short, immersive horror experience that will have you interacting with multiple onboard systems to keep yourself and your sub intact as you navigate downwards towards your only hope for survival. Use the systems around you in unorthodox ways to ward off creatures both known and unknown as they attempt to bring about an untimely end to your desperate voyage into the depths.

Can you reach the bottom?

Use the systems around you in unorthodox ways to ward off creatures both known and unknown as they attempt to bring about an untimely end to your desperate voyage into the depths.

supported_languages:
English*, Spanish - Latin America*
*languages with full audio support
